en: Abijah slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David. And Asa his son reigned in his place. In his days the land had rest for ten years.
zh: 亞比雅和他的列祖同睡，埋葬在大衛城裡，他的兒子亞撒接續他作王。亞撒在世的日子，國中太平了十年。

en: And Asa did what was good and right in the eyes of the LORD his God.
zh: 亞撒行耶和華他的 神看為善為正的事。

en: He took away the foreign altars and the high places and broke down the pillars and cut down the Asherim
zh: 他除掉外族人的祭壇和邱壇，打斷神柱，砍下亞舍拉，

en: and commanded Judah to seek the LORD, the God of their fathers, and to keep the law and the commandment.
zh: 吩咐猶大人尋求耶和華他們列祖的 神，遵行他的律法和誡命。

en: He also took out of all the cities of Judah the high places and the incense altars. And the kingdom had rest under him.
zh: 他又在猶大各城中，除掉邱壇和香壇。那時全國在他的統治下享受太平。

en: He built fortified cities in Judah, for the land had rest. He had no war in those years, for the LORD gave him peace.
zh: 他又在猶大建造了幾座設防城，因為國中太平，多年沒有戰爭，耶和華使他享受安寧。

en: And he said to Judah, "Let us build these cities and surround them with walls and towers, gates and bars. The land is still ours, because we have sought the LORD our God. We have sought him, and he has given us peace on every side." So they built and prospered.
zh: 他對猶大人說：“我們要建造這些城，在四周築牆，建造城樓，安設城門，製作門閂。這地還屬於我們，是因為我們尋求耶和華我們的 神；我們既然尋求他，他就使我們四境平安。”於是他們興工建造，事事順利。

en: And Asa had an army of 300,000 from Judah, armed with large shields and spears, and 280,000 men from Benjamin that carried shields and drew bows. All these were mighty men of valor.
zh: 亞撒的軍隊，拿大盾牌和矛槍的猶大人，共有三十萬；拿小盾牌和拉弓的便雅憫人，共有二十八萬；他們都是英勇的戰士。

en: Zerah the Ethiopian came out against them with an army of a million men and 300 chariots, and came as far as Mareshah.
zh: 那時有古實人謝拉率領一百萬軍隊，戰車三百輛，前來攻打猶大人；他來到了瑪利沙。

en: And Asa went out to meet him, and they drew up their lines of battle in the Valley of Zephathah at Mareshah.
zh: 於是亞撒出去迎戰；他們就在瑪利沙的洗法谷列陣相對。

en: And Asa cried to the LORD his God, "O LORD, there is none like you to help, between the mighty and the weak. Help us, O LORD our God, for we rely on you, and in your name we have come against this multitude. O LORD, you are our God; let not man prevail against you."
zh: 亞撒呼求耶和華他的 神說：“耶和華啊，強弱懸殊，除你以外沒有別的幫助。耶和華我們的 神啊，求你幫助我們。因為我們倚靠你，奉你的名去對抗這大軍。耶和華啊，你是我們的 神，不要讓人勝過你。”

en: So the LORD defeated the Ethiopians before Asa and before Judah, and the Ethiopians fled.
zh: 於是耶和華在亞撒和猶大人面前，使古實人大敗，古實人就逃跑。

en: Asa and the people who were with him pursued them as far as Gerar, and the Ethiopians fell until none remained alive, for they were broken before the LORD and his army. The men of Judah carried away very much spoil.
zh: 亞撒和跟隨他的人民追趕他們，直到基拉耳；古實人被殺的很多，不能恢復強盛；因為他們在耶和華和他的軍隊面前被擊潰了；猶大人奪取了極多戰利品。

en: And they attacked all the cities around Gerar, for the fear of the LORD was upon them. They plundered all the cities, for there was much plunder in them.
zh: 他們又攻擊基拉耳周圍的一切城市，因為各城的人都懼怕耶和華。猶大人又把各城洗掠一空，因為城中的財物甚多。

en: And they struck down the tents of those who had livestock and carried away sheep in abundance and camels. Then they returned to Jerusalem.
zh: 他們又毀壞了牲畜的棚，牽走了很多的羊和駱駝，然後回耶路撒冷去了。
